description:
GIVEN a game is live/in-progress
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a user views a game tile in a focused state
steps.result:
THEN the tile background is white
AND the text is black (player position and stats, and "Broadcast Networks" will be in gray text)
AND a red "LIVE" badge is displayed in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND the inning, base runners paw print, batter count, number of outs is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the away team logo with team name displays left justified below the "LIVE" badge
AND the home team logo with team name displays left justified below the away team
AND the team runs scored are displayed right justified in-line with the respective teams
AND the current batter headshot with last name, position, and stats is displayed left justified below "CURRENT AT BAT"
AND the current pitcher's headshot with last name, position, and stats is displayed to the right of the current batter
AND the available "Broadcast Networks" displays below the batter/pitcher matchup
